body:
Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are tight — the synchronisation on the lead-through has come a long way since January. But around the 4:20 mark, when the back line crosses through, there's a half-beat lag that compounds into the finish. Not sure if it's the floor or the dancers reading each other, but it reads on camera as a hiccup right before the strongest section.

Also, and this is just me — does the finale need the full eight-bar coda? It felt long on the recording. Maybe just seeing it fresh on a screen rather than live.
snippet: Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are ...
subject: The Clare set — second half timing

body:
The lag is Priya and Kavitha — they're dancing to each other instead of to the music. I've flagged it twice but I'll pull them aside Thursday before the full company call. It'll sort.

The coda question is fair. I've been going back and forth on it for three weeks. It's traditional to hold the full eight bars but the energy does drop. I'm going to try cutting to four in Thursday's run and see if the exit lands cleaner. If it works on the Narada Gana Sabha stage with that back depth, I'll keep it short.

Can you send me the timestamp clip? I want to watch the crossover frame by frame.
snippet: The lag is Priya and Kavitha — they're dancing to each other instead of to the m...
subject: Re: The Clare set — second half timing

body:
Ciarán came back to me. He can have the jig-reel medley mixed and sent over by Thursday evening, but he needs to know the BPM range for the senior girls' set before he finalises the second reel. Can you send that over?

Also — are you still planning the full run-through for Saturday morning, or did that shift when the Kalakshetra booking fell through? Siobhan mentioned something about a conflict but I wasn't sure if that was the kids' rehearsal or yours.
snippet: Ciarán came back to me. He can have the jig-reel medley mixed and sent over by T...
subject: Rince Mór show - rehearsal date + Ciarán's track

body:
Senior set runs at 113–116 BPM — closer to 113 for the opening 8 bars, then they settle. Tell him not to push the second reel past 116 or Aoife loses the treble timing in the turn.

Saturday is confirmed, 8:30–11:00, studio two. Siobhan's conflict is her own — she's at Nandini's bharatanatyam arangetram and I've already told her to be back by 12. That's nothing to do with the rehearsal.

Kalakshetra slot moved to the 5th of July. Same programme, different date. I'll update the parents tonight.
snippet: Senior set runs at 113–116 BPM — closer to 113 for the opening 8 bars, then they...
subject: Re: Rince Mór show - rehearsal date + Ciarán's track

body:
Passed the BPM to Ciarán, he says grand and he'll keep the second reel at 114. Draft track by Friday morning so you have it before Saturday.

Declan's asking if he can sit in on Saturday to watch. I said I'd check — no strong feelings either way, just didn't want to assume. He'll stay out of the way.
snippet: Passed the BPM to Ciarán, he says grand and he'll keep the second reel at 114. D...
subject: Re: Rince Mór show - rehearsal date + Ciarán's track

body:
Jean — is the 19th slot morning or evening? Trying to figure out if Siobhan and Declan can come straight from school or if we need to arrange something. Also, Amma rang — she and Appa want to come down from Cork for it if the dates work. They're saying they need three weeks' notice minimum for flights.

And did the Sabha send the technical sheet yet? Priya mentioned it was going out this week.
snippet: Jean — is the 19th slot morning or evening? Trying to figure out if Siobhan and ...
subject: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
Evening — 6:30 curtain, done by 8:15. School run is fine as normal.

Tell your parents to book. Cork to Chennai in December is manageable through Dubai; they've done the route before. Three weeks is enough notice.

No technical sheet yet. I've chased Priya twice. Once I have the confirmed stage width I can finalise the Treble Reel formation — everything else is set. Programme order: céilí sets to open, Fionnuala solo mid-programme, full ensemble to close.
snippet:
Evening — 6:30 curtain, done by 8:15. School run is fine as normal.

Tell your p...
subject: Re: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
Priya just rang here — stage is 20 feet wide, not 22. She said the technical sheet went to your old Finthesiss address and bounced. I've forwarded it to the right one now, should be in your inbox.

She also wants the programme notes by Thursday. I told her I'd check with you before confirming.
snippet: Priya just rang here — stage is 20 feet wide, not 22. She said the technical she...
subject: Re: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
20 feet changes the Treble Reel. I'll pull two dancers from the back line — better to do it now than fix it in the wings on the night.

Thursday is fine for the notes. I'll have them done Wednesday evening so you have them in case Priya follows up with you first.

Can you confirm to her: eight on stage for the opening céilí set, twelve for the ensemble close. She'll need the numbers for the lighting plot.
snippet: 20 feet changes the Treble Reel. I'll pull two dancers from the back line — bett...
subject: Re: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
Finishing the Tidel Park thing by noon on Thursday. Are you free after that? Was thinking Murugan's in Adyar if you don't need to be back at the studio. Haven't seen you properly since Monday.

Declan's after ringing me about his summer camp fees, by the way. Left it with you in case you already paid.
snippet: Finishing the Tidel Park thing by noon on Thursday. Are you free after that? Was...
subject: Thursday lunch?

body:
Yes, Thursday works. Junior batch finishes at 11:30 and I don't have anyone in until 3. Murugan's is fine — the one near the signal, not the Besant Nagar branch.

Declan's fees are paid. He knows that. He's fishing for pocket money again.
snippet: Yes, Thursday works. Junior batch finishes at 11:30 and I don't have anyone in u...
subject: Re: Thursday lunch?

body:
Ha. Right, I'll tell him to ask Siobhan.

Should I book a table or do they not do that? I never know with Murugan's. Also — do you want me to pick you up from the studio or just meet there? I'll have the car.
snippet:
Ha. Right, I'll tell him to ask Siobhan.

Should I book a table or do they not d...
subject: Re: Thursday lunch?

body:
They don't book. We'll get a table if we go before 12:30. Meet me there — I'll walk over after class, it's only ten minutes and I need the air after an hour of reels indoors.

Bring the umbrella. It's been threatening since yesterday.
snippet: They don't book. We'll get a table if we go before 12:30. Meet me there — I'll w...
subject: Re: Thursday lunch?

body:
12:15 at Murugan's. Got it.

I'll bring the umbrella. You won't, and then you'll want mine, so I'm bringing two.
snippet:
12:15 at Murugan's. Got it.

I'll bring the umbrella. You won't, and then you'll...
subject: Re: Thursday lunch?

body:
Quick one. Declan has football trials at 4pm Saturday at SSN grounds. If the showcase runs past 3:30 I can't do pickup for both him and Siobhan. Can you check with Meera whether the junior set starts on time or is she doing her usual 20-minute drift?

Also — are you still expecting me to shift the stage risers from the academy before I leave? If so I need to know by Thursday so I can borrow Ravi's van.
snippet: Quick one. Declan has football trials at 4pm Saturday at SSN grounds. If the sho...
subject: Saturday showcase — pickup timing

body:
Junior set is 2:15, should be done by 3. Meera confirmed this morning, she's actually early for once because the hall has a booking at 5.

Declan is fine. Siobhan can come with me after teardown, I'll have her to you by 6 at the latest.

Skip the risers — Priya's bringing her husband's Innova, we'll manage. You don't need Ravi's van.

— J
snippet: Junior set is 2:15, should be done by 3. Meera confirmed this morning, she's act...
subject: Re: Saturday showcase — pickup timing

body:
Client dinner Thursday, won't be home before 9. Can you handle pickup? Declan's got football until 5:30 and Siobhan's done at 4.

Also been thinking about Mahabalipuram Saturday if the rain holds. Declan's been on about it for weeks. Does your Saturday morning session run long?
snippet: Client dinner Thursday, won't be home before 9. Can you handle pickup? Declan's ...
subject: This week - Thursday and Saturday

body:
Thursday's fine. Advanced girls finish at 6, I'll collect them both on the way back.

Saturday session ends at 11. If we leave by noon we'd have the full afternoon there. Monsoon's been patchy so check the forecast Friday before we commit - last thing I want is two wet kids and a fogged windscreen on the ECR for two hours.

Declan will make straight for the lighthouse. We know this.
snippet: Thursday's fine. Advanced girls finish at 6, I'll collect them both on the way b...
subject: Re: This week - Thursday and Saturday

body:
Friday forecast check, noted. I'll pack the car Saturday morning just in case we go.

Siobhan asked if she can bring her friend Priya. Told her I'd check with you first. If it's a yes I'll need the bigger cooler.
snippet: Friday forecast check, noted. I'll pack the car Saturday morning just in case we...
subject: Re: This week - Thursday and Saturday

body:
Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are tight — the synchronisation on the lead-through has come a long way since January. But around the 4:20 mark, when the back line crosses through, there's a half-beat lag that compounds into the finish. Not sure if it's the floor or the dancers reading each other, but it reads on camera as a hiccup right before the strongest section.

Also, and this is just me — does the finale need the full eight-bar coda? It felt long on the recording. Maybe just seeing it fresh on a screen rather than live.
snippet: Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are ...
subject: The Clare set — second half timing

body:
Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are tight — the synchronisation on the lead-through has come a long way since January. But around the 4:20 mark, when the back line crosses through, there's a half-beat lag that compounds into the finish. Not sure if it's the floor or the dancers reading each other, but it reads on camera as a hiccup right before the strongest section.

Also, and this is just me — does the finale need the full eight-bar coda? It felt long on the recording. Maybe just seeing it fresh on a screen rather than live.
snippet: Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are ...
subject: The Clare set — second half timing

body:
The lag is Priya and Kavitha — they're dancing to each other instead of to the music. I've flagged it twice but I'll pull them aside Thursday before the full company call. It'll sort.

The coda question is fair. I've been going back and forth on it for three weeks. It's traditional to hold the full eight bars but the energy does drop. I'm going to try cutting to four in Thursday's run and see if the exit lands cleaner. If it works on the Narada Gana Sabha stage with that back depth, I'll keep it short.

Can you send me the timestamp clip? I want to watch the crossover frame by frame.
snippet: The lag is Priya and Kavitha — they're dancing to each other instead of to the m...
subject: Re: The Clare set — second half timing

body:
Ciarán came back to me. He can have the jig-reel medley mixed and sent over by Thursday evening, but he needs to know the BPM range for the senior girls' set before he finalises the second reel. Can you send that over?

Also — are you still planning the full run-through for Saturday morning, or did that shift when the Kalakshetra booking fell through? Siobhan mentioned something about a conflict but I wasn't sure if that was the kids' rehearsal or yours.
snippet: Ciarán came back to me. He can have the jig-reel medley mixed and sent over by T...
subject: Rince Mór show - rehearsal date + Ciarán's track

body:
Senior set runs at 113–116 BPM — closer to 113 for the opening 8 bars, then they settle. Tell him not to push the second reel past 116 or Aoife loses the treble timing in the turn.

Saturday is confirmed, 8:30–11:00, studio two. Siobhan's conflict is her own — she's at Nandini's bharatanatyam arangetram and I've already told her to be back by 12. That's nothing to do with the rehearsal.

Kalakshetra slot moved to the 5th of July. Same programme, different date. I'll update the parents tonight.
snippet: Senior set runs at 113–116 BPM — closer to 113 for the opening 8 bars, then they...
subject: Re: Rince Mór show - rehearsal date + Ciarán's track

body:
Passed the BPM to Ciarán, he says grand and he'll keep the second reel at 114. Draft track by Friday morning so you have it before Saturday.

Declan's asking if he can sit in on Saturday to watch. I said I'd check — no strong feelings either way, just didn't want to assume. He'll stay out of the way.
snippet: Passed the BPM to Ciarán, he says grand and he'll keep the second reel at 114. D...
subject: Re: Rince Mór show - rehearsal date + Ciarán's track

body:
Jean — is the 19th slot morning or evening? Trying to figure out if Siobhan and Declan can come straight from school or if we need to arrange something. Also, Amma rang — she and Appa want to come down from Cork for it if the dates work. They're saying they need three weeks' notice minimum for flights.

And did the Sabha send the technical sheet yet? Priya mentioned it was going out this week.
snippet: Jean — is the 19th slot morning or evening? Trying to figure out if Siobhan and ...
subject: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
Evening — 6:30 curtain, done by 8:15. School run is fine as normal.

Tell your parents to book. Cork to Chennai in December is manageable through Dubai; they've done the route before. Three weeks is enough notice.

No technical sheet yet. I've chased Priya twice. Once I have the confirmed stage width I can finalise the Treble Reel formation — everything else is set. Programme order: céilí sets to open, Fionnuala solo mid-programme, full ensemble to close.
snippet:
Evening — 6:30 curtain, done by 8:15. School run is fine as normal.

Tell your p...
subject: Re: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
Priya just rang here — stage is 20 feet wide, not 22. She said the technical sheet went to your old Finthesiss address and bounced. I've forwarded it to the right one now, should be in your inbox.

She also wants the programme notes by Thursday. I told her I'd check with you before confirming.
snippet: Priya just rang here — stage is 20 feet wide, not 22. She said the technical she...
subject: Re: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
20 feet changes the Treble Reel. I'll pull two dancers from the back line — better to do it now than fix it in the wings on the night.

Thursday is fine for the notes. I'll have them done Wednesday evening so you have them in case Priya follows up with you first.

Can you confirm to her: eight on stage for the opening céilí set, twelve for the ensemble close. She'll need the numbers for the lighting plot.
snippet: 20 feet changes the Treble Reel. I'll pull two dancers from the back line — bett...
subject: Re: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
Finishing the Tidel Park thing by noon on Thursday. Are you free after that? Was thinking Murugan's in Adyar if you don't need to be back at the studio. Haven't seen you properly since Monday.

Declan's after ringing me about his summer camp fees, by the way. Left it with you in case you already paid.
snippet: Finishing the Tidel Park thing by noon on Thursday. Are you free after that? Was...
subject: Thursday lunch?

body:
Yes, Thursday works. Junior batch finishes at 11:30 and I don't have anyone in until 3. Murugan's is fine — the one near the signal, not the Besant Nagar branch.

Declan's fees are paid. He knows that. He's fishing for pocket money again.
snippet: Yes, Thursday works. Junior batch finishes at 11:30 and I don't have anyone in u...
subject: Re: Thursday lunch?

body:
Ha. Right, I'll tell him to ask Siobhan.

Should I book a table or do they not do that? I never know with Murugan's. Also — do you want me to pick you up from the studio or just meet there? I'll have the car.
snippet:
Ha. Right, I'll tell him to ask Siobhan.

Should I book a table or do they not d...
subject: Re: Thursday lunch?

body:
They don't book. We'll get a table if we go before 12:30. Meet me there — I'll walk over after class, it's only ten minutes and I need the air after an hour of reels indoors.

Bring the umbrella. It's been threatening since yesterday.
snippet: They don't book. We'll get a table if we go before 12:30. Meet me there — I'll w...
subject: Re: Thursday lunch?

body:
12:15 at Murugan's. Got it.

I'll bring the umbrella. You won't, and then you'll want mine, so I'm bringing two.
snippet:
12:15 at Murugan's. Got it.

I'll bring the umbrella. You won't, and then you'll...
subject: Re: Thursday lunch?

body:
Quick one. Declan has football trials at 4pm Saturday at SSN grounds. If the showcase runs past 3:30 I can't do pickup for both him and Siobhan. Can you check with Meera whether the junior set starts on time or is she doing her usual 20-minute drift?

Also — are you still expecting me to shift the stage risers from the academy before I leave? If so I need to know by Thursday so I can borrow Ravi's van.
snippet: Quick one. Declan has football trials at 4pm Saturday at SSN grounds. If the sho...
subject: Saturday showcase — pickup timing

body:
Junior set is 2:15, should be done by 3. Meera confirmed this morning, she's actually early for once because the hall has a booking at 5.

Declan is fine. Siobhan can come with me after teardown, I'll have her to you by 6 at the latest.

Skip the risers — Priya's bringing her husband's Innova, we'll manage. You don't need Ravi's van.

— J
snippet: Junior set is 2:15, should be done by 3. Meera confirmed this morning, she's act...
subject: Re: Saturday showcase — pickup timing

body:
Client dinner Thursday, won't be home before 9. Can you handle pickup? Declan's got football until 5:30 and Siobhan's done at 4.

Also been thinking about Mahabalipuram Saturday if the rain holds. Declan's been on about it for weeks. Does your Saturday morning session run long?
snippet: Client dinner Thursday, won't be home before 9. Can you handle pickup? Declan's ...
subject: This week - Thursday and Saturday

body:
Thursday's fine. Advanced girls finish at 6, I'll collect them both on the way back.

Saturday session ends at 11. If we leave by noon we'd have the full afternoon there. Monsoon's been patchy so check the forecast Friday before we commit - last thing I want is two wet kids and a fogged windscreen on the ECR for two hours.

Declan will make straight for the lighthouse. We know this.
snippet: Thursday's fine. Advanced girls finish at 6, I'll collect them both on the way b...
subject: Re: This week - Thursday and Saturday

body:
Friday forecast check, noted. I'll pack the car Saturday morning just in case we go.

Siobhan asked if she can bring her friend Priya. Told her I'd check with you first. If it's a yes I'll need the bigger cooler.
snippet: Friday forecast check, noted. I'll pack the car Saturday morning just in case we...

Saturday session ends at 11. If we leave by noon we'd have the full afternoon there. Monsoon's been patchy so check the forecast Friday before we commit - last thing I want is two wet kids and a fogged windscreen on the ECR for two hours.

Declan will make straight for the lighthouse. We know this.
snippet: Thursday's fine. Advanced girls finish at 6, I'll collect them both on the way b...
subject: Re: This week - Thursday and Saturday

body:
Friday forecast check, noted. I'll pack the car Saturday morning just in case we go.

Siobhan asked if she can bring her friend Priya. Told her I'd check with you first. If it's a yes I'll need the bigger cooler.
snippet: Friday forecast check, noted. I'll pack the car Saturday morning just in case we...
subject: Re: This week - Thursday and Saturday

body:
Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are tight — the synchronisation on the lead-through has come a long way since January. But around the 4:20 mark, when the back line crosses through, there's a half-beat lag that compounds into the finish. Not sure if it's the floor or the dancers reading each other, but it reads on camera as a hiccup right before the strongest section.

Also, and this is just me — does the finale need the full eight-bar coda? It felt long on the recording. Maybe just seeing it fresh on a screen rather than live.
snippet: Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are ...
subject: The Clare set — second half timing

body:
Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are tight — the synchronisation on the lead-through has come a long way since January. But around the 4:20 mark, when the back line crosses through, there's a half-beat lag that compounds into the finish. Not sure if it's the floor or the dancers reading each other, but it reads on camera as a hiccup right before the strongest section.

Also, and this is just me — does the finale need the full eight-bar coda? It felt long on the recording. Maybe just seeing it fresh on a screen rather than live.
snippet: Watched the recording from Tuesday's run-through. The opening three figures are ...
subject: The Clare set — second half timing

body:
The lag is Priya and Kavitha — they're dancing to each other instead of to the music. I've flagged it twice but I'll pull them aside Thursday before the full company call. It'll sort.

The coda question is fair. I've been going back and forth on it for three weeks. It's traditional to hold the full eight bars but the energy does drop. I'm going to try cutting to four in Thursday's run and see if the exit lands cleaner. If it works on the Narada Gana Sabha stage with that back depth, I'll keep it short.

Can you send me the timestamp clip? I want to watch the crossover frame by frame.
snippet: The lag is Priya and Kavitha — they're dancing to each other instead of to the m...
subject: Re: The Clare set — second half timing

body:
Ciarán came back to me. He can have the jig-reel medley mixed and sent over by Thursday evening, but he needs to know the BPM range for the senior girls' set before he finalises the second reel. Can you send that over?

Also — are you still planning the full run-through for Saturday morning, or did that shift when the Kalakshetra booking fell through? Siobhan mentioned something about a conflict but I wasn't sure if that was the kids' rehearsal or yours.
snippet: Ciarán came back to me. He can have the jig-reel medley mixed and sent over by T...
subject: Rince Mór show - rehearsal date + Ciarán's track

body:
Senior set runs at 113–116 BPM — closer to 113 for the opening 8 bars, then they settle. Tell him not to push the second reel past 116 or Aoife loses the treble timing in the turn.

Saturday is confirmed, 8:30–11:00, studio two. Siobhan's conflict is her own — she's at Nandini's bharatanatyam arangetram and I've already told her to be back by 12. That's nothing to do with the rehearsal.

Kalakshetra slot moved to the 5th of July. Same programme, different date. I'll update the parents tonight.
snippet: Senior set runs at 113–116 BPM — closer to 113 for the opening 8 bars, then they...
subject: Re: Rince Mór show - rehearsal date + Ciarán's track

body:
Passed the BPM to Ciarán, he says grand and he'll keep the second reel at 114. Draft track by Friday morning so you have it before Saturday.

Declan's asking if he can sit in on Saturday to watch. I said I'd check — no strong feelings either way, just didn't want to assume. He'll stay out of the way.
snippet: Passed the BPM to Ciarán, he says grand and he'll keep the second reel at 114. D...
subject: Re: Rince Mór show - rehearsal date + Ciarán's track

body:
Jean — is the 19th slot morning or evening? Trying to figure out if Siobhan and Declan can come straight from school or if we need to arrange something. Also, Amma rang — she and Appa want to come down from Cork for it if the dates work. They're saying they need three weeks' notice minimum for flights.

And did the Sabha send the technical sheet yet? Priya mentioned it was going out this week.
snippet: Jean — is the 19th slot morning or evening? Trying to figure out if Siobhan and ...
subject: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
Evening — 6:30 curtain, done by 8:15. School run is fine as normal.

Tell your parents to book. Cork to Chennai in December is manageable through Dubai; they've done the route before. Three weeks is enough notice.

No technical sheet yet. I've chased Priya twice. Once I have the confirmed stage width I can finalise the Treble Reel formation — everything else is set. Programme order: céilí sets to open, Fionnuala solo mid-programme, full ensemble to close.
snippet:
Evening — 6:30 curtain, done by 8:15. School run is fine as normal.

Tell your p...
subject: Re: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
Priya just rang here — stage is 20 feet wide, not 22. She said the technical sheet went to your old Finthesiss address and bounced. I've forwarded it to the right one now, should be in your inbox.

She also wants the programme notes by Thursday. I told her I'd check with you before confirming.
snippet: Priya just rang here — stage is 20 feet wide, not 22. She said the technical she...
subject: Re: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
20 feet changes the Treble Reel. I'll pull two dancers from the back line — better to do it now than fix it in the wings on the night.

Thursday is fine for the notes. I'll have them done Wednesday evening so you have them in case Priya follows up with you first.

Can you confirm to her: eight on stage for the opening céilí set, twelve for the ensemble close. She'll need the numbers for the lighting plot.
snippet: 20 feet changes the Treble Reel. I'll pull two dancers from the back line — bett...
subject: Re: Narada Gana Sabha slot - 19 Dec timing

body:
Finishing the Tidel Park thing by noon on Thursday. Are you free after that? Was thinking Murugan's in Adyar if you don't need to be back at the studio. Haven't seen you properly since Monday.

Declan's after ringing me about his summer camp fees, by the way. Left it with you in case you already paid.
snippet: Finishing the Tidel Park thing by noon on Thursday. Are you free after that? Was...
subject: Thursday lunch?
